switch-builder.title: Interactive switch constructor
switch-builder.description: Assemble `GrSwitch` for your scenario: change the state, size, label and local color overrides and get the resulting snippet instantly.

switch-size-scale.title: Size scale from compact to prominent
switch-size-scale.description: A single scenario shows how the switch scales from compact control bars to large form sections without changing behavior.

switch-disabled-labeled.title: Labeled switches and disabled state
switch-disabled-labeled.description: Shows that the label lives in the default slot, and the disabled mode works equally well for a controlled and a statically enabled switch.

switch-custom-colors.title: Custom active and inactive colors
switch-custom-colors.description: Captures one of the component's key integration capabilities: locally overriding track colors without changing the global theme.

builder.label: Label
builder.accessibilityPlaceholder: Used when the visible label is not enough
builder.summaryDisabled: A disabled switch blocks state changes but keeps the visual context of the current setting.
builder.summaryColors: Local color overrides help embed the switch into a special scenario without changing global theme tokens.
builder.summaryChecked: In the enabled state the track uses the primary accent and works well for key feature toggles.
builder.summaryDefault: Pick the size, label and optional accessibility/color props to quickly assemble the switch contract you need.
